message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant server
database "user" as db

User -> server: 1 POST /sign-up with body: email and password
activate server
server -> db: 2 Check email existence
activate db

alt [Email existed]
    db --> server: 3 Error code
    deactivate db
    server --> User: 4 Error message
else [Email is new]
    db --> server: 5 Email is available
    deactivate db
    server -> server: 6 Hash password
    server -> db: 7 Store email and hashed password
    activate db
    db --> server: 8 Store complete
    deactivate db
    server --> User: 9 Success message
end

deactivate server
@enduml
